	CHI_t_v_soong = {
			instance = {
				allowed = {
					has_dlc = "No Compromise, No Surrender"
				}
				name = CHI_t_v_soong

					army = { small="GFX_idea_CHI_t_v_soong" }
				}

					army = { small="GFX_idea_CHI_t_v_soong" }
				}
				advisor={
					slot = political_advisor
					visible = {
						NOT = {
							has_completed_focus = CHI_end_military_primacy
						}
					}
					available  = {
						has_completed_focus = CHI_draw_support_from_the_big_families
					}
					idea_token = CHI_t_v_soong
					traits  = {
						financial_expert 
					}
				}
			}

					NOT = {
						has_dlc = "No Compromise, No Surrender"
					}
				}
	
				name = CHI_t_v_soong

							is_chinese_warlord = yes

					available  = {
						has_completed_focus  = CHI_financial_policy 
					}

						financial_expert 
					}
				}
			}
		}

	CZE_augustin_voloshyn = {
			name = RUT_augustin_voloshyn

				civilian = {
					large = GFX_portrait_RUT_augustin_voloshyn
					small = GFX_portrait_RUT_augustin_voloshyn_small
				}
			}
			advisor={
				slot = political_advisor
				idea_token = CZE_augustin_voloshyn
				allowed  = {
					original_tag  = CZE
				}
				available = {
					has_completed_focus = CZE_comprise_with_the_carpathians
				}
				visible = {
					CZE_RUT_is_not_its_own_thing = yes
					NOT = {
						OR = {
							has_completed_focus = CZE_appeal_to_the_castle
							has_completed_focus = CZE_placate_benes_faction
							has_completed_focus = CZE_increase_funding_from_moscow
						}
					}
				}
				traits  = {
					CZE_prime_minister_of_carpathian_ukraine
				}
				ai_will_do = {
					factor = 0
				}
			}
			corps_commander={ #Only for unit leader event. SHOULD NEVER BE VISIBLE
				traits={ politically_connected }
				skill=1
				attack_skill=1
				defense_skill=1
				planning_skill=1
				logistics_skill=1
				legacy_id=-1
				visible = {
					always = no
				}
			}
		}

	# From characters\CZE.txt
	CZE_jan_syrovy = {
			name=CZE_jan_syrovy
			portraits={
				army={
					large=GFX_portrait_CZE_jan_syrovy
					small=GFX_portrait_CZE_jan_syrovy_small
				}
			}
			field_marshal={
				traits={ winter_specialist war_hero media_personality }
				skill=4
				attack_skill=3
				defense_skill=3
				planning_skill=4
				logistics_skill=3
				legacy_id=-1
			}
			advisor={
				slot = army_chief
				idea_token = CZE_jan_syrovy
				allowed = {
					original_tag = CZE
				}
				traits = {
					army_chief_morale_2
				}
				on_add = {
					owner = {
						if = {
							limit = {
								has_power_balance = {
									id = CZE_bop_army_readiness
								}
							}
							CZE_bop_very_low_increase_effect = yes
							custom_effect_tooltip = generic_skip_one_line_tt
						}
					}
				}
				on_remove = {
					owner = {
						if = {
							limit = {
								has_power_balance = {
									id = CZE_bop_army_readiness
								}
							}
							CZE_bop_very_low_decrease_effect = yes
						}
					}
				}
				cost = 100
				ai_will_do = {
					factor = 0
				}
			}
		}

	# From characters\DEN.txt
	DEN_cay_lembcke = {
			name = DEN_cay_lembcke
			portraits = {
				civilian = {
					large = GFX_portrait_DEN_cay_lembcke

			country_leader = {
				ideology = fascism_ideology
				traits = { DEN_fascist_militarist }
				expire = "1965.1.1.1"
				id = -1
			}
			advisor = {
				slot = political_advisor
				idea_token = DEN_cay_lembcke
				allowed = {
					original_tag = DEN
					has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"	
				}
				available = {
					is_country_leader = no
					OR = {
						has_completed_focus = DEN_strengthen_the_officer_corp
						has_government = fascism
					}	
					NOT = {
						has_government = communism
						has_character_flag = DEN_political_agitator_flag
						has_country_flag = DEN_banned_fascism_flag
					}
				}
				traits = {
					prince_of_terror 
				}
				ai_will_do = {
					base = 0
				}
				on_add = {
					owner = {
						DEN_advisor_low_BOP_increase_effect = yes
					}
				}
				on_remove = {
					owner = {
						DEN_advisor_low_BOP_decrease_effect = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}

	# From characters\DEN.txt
	DEN_christmas_moller = {

				idea_token = DEN_christmas_moller
				allowed = {
					original_tag = DEN
					has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
				}
				available = {
					is_country_leader = no
					NOT = { has_character_flag = DEN_political_agitator_flag }
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = DEN_policy_of_disarmament }
					NOT = { DEN_peter_rochegune_munch = { is_hired_as_advisor = yes }}
				}
				traits = {
					rearmament_proponent 
				}
				ai_will_do = {
					base = 5
					modifier = {
						factor = 0.5
						DEN_historical_ai = yes
					}
					modifier = {
						factor = 5
						is_subject = yes
					}
					modifier = {
						factor = 10
						OR = {
							DEN_rearming_ai = yes
							DEN_royal_ai = yes					
							DEN_fascist_ai = yes
						}
					}
				}
				on_add = {
					owner = {
						DEN_advisor_medium_BOP_increase_effect = yes
					}
				}
				on_remove = {
					owner = {
						DEN_advisor_medium_BOP_decrease_effect = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}

				traits = {
					army_chief_organizational_1

					base = 2
					modifier = {
						factor = 15
						has_active_mission = JAP_army_faction_demands_military_factories

				}

		}

						has_government = communism
					}
				}
	
				available = {
					NOT = {
						has_government = communism
					}
				}
	
				traits = {
					JAP_nissan_president
				}
				ai_will_do = {
					base = 0.5
				}
			}
	
		}

	# From characters\JAP.txt
	JAP_yosuke_matsuoka = {
			name = JAP_yosuke_matsuoka
	
			portraits = {
				civilian = {
					small = GFX_portrait_JAP_yosuke_matsuoka_small
					# GFX_portrait_JAP_komakichi_matsuoka_imprisoned
				}
			}
	
			advisor = {
				slot = political_advisor
				idea_token = JAP_yosuke_matsuoka
	
				allowed = {
					original_tag = JAP
				}
	
				visible = {
	
				}
	
				available = {
					has_completed_focus = JAP_eastern_road_and_steel_expansion
				}
	
				traits = {
					JAP_south_manchuria_railway_president
				}
				ai_will_do = {
					base = 1
				}
			}
	
		}

	# From characters\LAT.txt
	LAT_alberts_kvesis={
			name=LAT_alberts_kvesis
			portraits={
				civilian={
					large="GFX_portrait_LAT_alberts_kviesis"
				}
				army={
					small="GFX_idea_LAT_alberts_kviesis"
				}
			}
			advisor={
				slot = political_advisor
				idea_token = LAT_alberts_kvesis
				allowed = {
					original_tag = LAT
					has_dlc = "No Step Back"
				}
				available = {
					has_completed_focus = LAT_renew_kviesis_term 
				}
				traits = {
					subservient_democrat
				}
				ai_will_do = {
					factor = 10.000
				}
			}
	
			country_leader={
				ideology=conservatism
				expire="1965.1.1.1"
				id=-1
			}
		}

	# From characters\MEX.txt
	MEX_indigenous_council = { 
			name = MEX_indigenous_council
			portraits = {
				civilian = {
					large = GFX_portrait_indigenous_mexico_council
				}
				
			}
			
		}

	# From characters\PHI.txt
	PHI_artemio_ricarte = {
			advisor = {
				slot = political_advisor
				idea_token = PHI_artemio_ricarte
				allowed  = {
						has_dlc = "No Compromise, No Surrender"
	 				}
				traits  = {
					PHI_philippine_nationalist
				}
				cost = 150
				ai_will_do = {
					base = 1
					modifier = {
						factor = 5
						has_completed_focus = PHI_slippery_slope 
					}
				}
				available = {
					is_country_leader = no
				}
			}
			name = PHI_artemio_ricarte
			portraits = {
				civilian = {
					large = GFX_portrait_PHI_artemio_ricarte
					small = GFX_portrait_PHI_artemio_ricarte_small
				}
			}
			# Fascist Coup
			country_leader = {
			    ideology = fascism_ideology
			    expire = "1965.1.1.1"
			    traits = { PHI_philippine_nationalist_leader }
			}			
		}

	# From characters\PHI.txt
	PHI_emilio_aguinaldo = {
			instance = {
				allowed = {
					has_dlc = "No Compromise, No Surrender"
				}
				advisor = {
					slot = political_advisor
					idea_token = PHI_emilio_aguinaldo
					allowed  = {
						original_tag  = PHI
					}
					traits  = {
						PHI_revolutionary_hero 
					}
					available = {
						is_country_leader = no
					}
				}
				name = PHI_emilio_aguinaldo
				portraits={
					civilian = {
						large = GFX_portrait_PHI_emilio_aguinaldo
						small = GFX_portrait_PHI_emilio_aguinaldo_small
					}
				}
				country_leader = {
				    ideology = despotism						#better than centrism I guess
				    expire = "1965.1.1.1"
				    traits = { PHI_revolutionary_president }	#no drift or anything, works here too
				}
				# Fascist Coup
	#			country_leader = {
	#			    ideology = falangism
	#			    expire = "1965.1.1.1"
	#			    traits = { PHI_revolutionary_president }
	#			}				
			}
	
			instance = {
				allowed = {
					NOT = {
						has_dlc = "No Compromise, No Surrender"
					}
				}
				advisor = {
					slot = political_advisor
					idea_token = PHI_emilio_aguinaldo
					traits  = {
						popular_figurehead 
					}
				}
				name = PHI_emilio_aguinaldo
				portraits={
					army={
						small="GFX_idea_generic_political_advisor_asia_3"
					}
				}
			}
		}

	# From characters\PHI.txt
	PHI_jose_laurel={
			instance = {
				allowed = {
					has_dlc = "No Compromise, No Surrender"
				}
	
				name = PHI_jose_laurel
				portraits = {
					civilian = {
						large = GFX_portrait_PHI_jose_laurel
						small = GFX_portrait_PHI_jose_laurel_small 
					}
				}
				# 1941 Election
	#			country_leader = {
	#				ideology = conservatism
	#				expire = "1965.1.1.1"
	#				id = -1
	#				traits = { PHI_social_reformer }
	#			}
	
				# Puppet
	#			country_leader = {
	#				ideology = falangism
	#				expire = "1965.1.1.1"
	#				id = -1
	#				traits = { PHI_puppet_president }
	#			}
				advisor = {
					slot = political_advisor
					idea_token = PHI_jose_laurel
					allowed  = {
						original_tag  = PHI
						has_dlc = "No Compromise, No Surrender"
					}
					traits  = {
						PHI_social_reformer 
					}
					available = {
						is_country_leader = no
					}
				}			
			}
	
			instance = {
				allowed = {
					NOT = {
						has_dlc = "No Compromise, No Surrender"
					}
				}
				
				name = PHI_jose_laurel
				portraits = {
					civilian = {
						large = "gfx/leaders/Asia/Portrait_Asia_Generic_democracy.dds"
					}
				}
			}
		}

	# From characters\PHI.txt
	PHI_manuel_luis_quezon = {
			instance = {
				allowed = {
					has_dlc = "No Compromise, No Surrender"
				}
	
				name = PHI_manuel_luis_quezon

					NOT = {
						has_dlc = "No Compromise, No Surrender"
					}
				}
				name = PHI_manuel_luis_quezon

						large = GFX_portrait_Manuel_Luis_Quezon
					}
				}
				country_leader = {
					ideology = conservatism
					expire = "1965.1.1.1"
					id = -1
				}
			}
		}

	# From characters\PHI.txt
	PHI_manuel_roxas = {
			advisor = {
				slot = political_advisor
				idea_token = PHI_manuel_roxas
				allowed  = {
						has_dlc = "No Compromise, No Surrender"
	 				}
				available = {
					is_country_leader = no
					NOT = { 
						has_completed_focus = PHI_anti_hacendados 
					}
				}
				ai_will_do = {
					base = 1
					modifier = {
						factor = 0
						has_completed_focus = PHI_slippery_slope 
					}
				}
				traits  = {
					PHI_hacendado
				}
			}
			name= PHI_manuel_roxas
			portraits = {
				civilian = {
					large = GFX_portrait_PHI_manuel_roxas
					small = GFX_portrait_PHI_manuel_roxas_small
				}
			}
						# Democratic Candidate
			#			country_leader = {
			#				ideology = conservatism
			#				expire = "1965.1.1.1"
			#				id = -1
			#				traits = { PHI_political_hacendado }
			#			}
		}

	# From characters\SWE.txt
	SWE_ebba_palmstierna={
			advisor={
				#visible = { has_government = democratic }
				available = {
					OR = {
						has_government = democratic 
						has_government = communism
					}
				}
				slot = political_advisor
				cost = 75
				idea_token = SWE_ebba_palmstierna
				allowed  = {
					original_tag  = SWE
				}
				traits  = {
					SWE_suffragette 
				}
				on_add = {
					SWE = {
						if = {
							limit = {
								SWE_ebba_palmstierna = {
									NOT = { has_character_flag = is_hired }
								}
							}
	
							unlock_decision_tooltip = {
							 	decision = SWE_ebba_add_research
							 	show_effect_tooltip = yes # default is no
							 	show_modifiers = yes # default is no
							 }
	
							unlock_decision_tooltip = {
							 	decision = SWE_ebba_add_production
							 	show_effect_tooltip = yes # default is no
							 	show_modifiers = yes # default is no
							 }
							unlock_decision_tooltip = {
							 	decision = SWE_ebba_political_clout
							 	show_effect_tooltip = yes # default is no
							 	show_modifiers = yes # default is no
							 } 
						}
						else = {
							unlock_decision_tooltip = {
							 	decision = SWE_ebba_add_research
							 }
	
							unlock_decision_tooltip = {
							 	decision = SWE_ebba_add_production
							 }
							unlock_decision_tooltip = {
							 	decision = SWE_ebba_political_clout
							 } 
						}
	
					}
					set_character_flag = is_hired
				}
	
				on_remove = {
					clr_character_flag = is_hired
				}
			}
			name=SWE_ebba_palmstierna
			portraits={
				civilian={
					small="GFX_portrait_SWE_ebba_palmstierna_small"
				}
			}
		}

	# From characters\SWE.txt
	SWE_herman_eriksson={
			advisor={
				slot = political_advisor
				cost = 75
				idea_token = SWE_herman_eriksson
				visible = { 
					OR = {
						has_government = democratic 
						has_government = communism
						has_government = neutrality
					}
				}
	
				available = {
					OR = {
						has_government = democratic 
						has_government = communism
						has_government = neutrality
					}
				}
				allowed  = {
					original_tag  = SWE
				}
				traits  = {
					SWE_minister_of_trade 
				}
	
				on_add = {
					set_character_flag = is_hired
				}
	
				on_remove = {
					clr_character_flag = is_hired
				}
			}
			name=SWE_herman_eriksson
			portraits={
				civilian={
					small="GFX_portrait_portrait_SWE_herman_eriksson_small"
				}
			}
		}

	# From characters\SWE.txt
	SWE_king_gustaf_v = {
			name=SWE_king_gustaf_v
			portraits={
				civilian={
					small="GFX_idea_SWE_king_gustaf"
				}
	
				army = {
					large = "GFX_portrait_SWE_king_gustaf_v"
				}
	
			}
	
			advisor={
				slot = political_advisor
				cost = 200
				idea_token = SWE_king_gustaf_v
				visible = { 
	
				}
	
				visible = {
					is_country_leader = no
				}
				available = { 
					is_country_leader = no
					NOT = {
						has_completed_focus = SWE_liquidate_the_monarchy
					}
				}
				allowed  = {
					original_tag  = SWE
				}
				traits  = {
					SWE_ardent_conservative 
				}
			}
			#country_leader={
			#	ideology=centrism
			#	expire="1965.1.1.1"
			#	id = -1
			#}
	
		}

	# From characters\USA.txt
	USA_native_american_council = {
			name = USA_native_american_council
			portraits = {
				civilian = {
					large = GFX_portrait_native_american_usa_council

			}
	
		}
}
